hook_taxonomy.application: Join the VoiceUp community to transform your career with confidence in English.
example_phrases: You're one step closer to a fulfilling career!
Unlock your full potential in English.

hook_taxonomy.application: Complete 5 lessons and keep the momentum going with VoiceUp's daily speaking practice!
example_phrases: You've completed 3 lessons! Keep pushing forward!
Every small win counts in your English journey.

hook_taxonomy.application: Take control of your English learning with VoiceUp's personalized coaching and expert guidance.
example_phrases: It's time to take your English skills to the next level!
Unlock a world of opportunities with VoiceUp.

hook_taxonomy.application: Your progress is yours alone. Track your improvement and celebrate your successes with VoiceUp.
example_phrases: You've earned 10 coins! Use them to unlock new features!
Your hard work is paying off. Keep going!

hook_taxonomy.application: Join the ranks of our 1M+ learners who have transformed their careers with VoiceUp.
example_phrases: You're part of a community that's changing lives!
Be inspired by others who are achieving their English goals.

hook_taxonomy.application: Don't miss out on this limited-time offer! Complete your trial and start speaking with VoiceUp today.
example_phrases: Only 2 days left in your trial! Don't let it slip away!
Act now and take the first step towards a fulfilling career.

hook_taxonomy.application: Surprise reward inside today's lesson! Stay tuned for exciting updates and new features.
example_phrases: What's in store for you? Find out with VoiceUp!
Every day is a surprise with our daily speaking practice.

hook_taxonomy.application: Don't let your streak slip away! Stay motivated and keep practicing with VoiceUp.
example_phrases: Your 7-day streak is at risk. Don't let it happen!
Stay on track and keep pushing forward.

matrix.tone_rationale: To motivate the user to start their journey and make a commitment to learning English.
To motivate the user to continue their learning journey and celebrate their progress.
To re-engage the user and make them feel welcome back to VoiceUp.
To re-activate the user with a gentle nudge and provide them with useful information.

bilingual_note: All messages must be available in Hindi and English
